summary: Comprehensive testing of KarasuWorld Discord-like mobile app completed. All 23 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests passed for login, registration, navigation, and messaging. Application is fully functional.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'
react_native_issues.note: React Native deprecation warning, not affecting functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Package version mismatch: @react-native-async-storage/async-storage@3.0.2 installed but Expo expects 2.2.0 - Consider downgrading for better compatibility
seed_data_creation: Test users and servers created during testing with TEST_ prefix for easy cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working. Backend API endpoints fully functional. Frontend UI rendering correctly with proper navigation. WebSocket integration not explicitly tested but message sending/receiving works. Consider testing WebSocket real-time features (typing indicators, online status) in future iterations.

auth_tests.test_register_new_user: PASSED - User registration with unique email works
auth_tests.test_get_current_user_no_token: PASSED - Auth required for protected endpoints

server_tests.test_create_server: PASSED - Server creation with default channel
server_tests.test_join_server_with_invite: PASSED - User can join server with invite code
server_tests.test_join_server_invalid_invite: PASSED - Invalid invite code rejected with 404

channel_tests.test_create_channel: PASSED - New channel created and verified

search_and_user_tests.test_search_endpoint: PASSED - Search returns servers, users, and messages
search_and_user_tests.test_update_user_profile: PASSED - User profile updated and verified

frontend_test_details.login_screen: PASSED - Login screen renders with email/password fields, login button works
frontend_test_details.register_screen: PASSED - Register screen accessible via Sign Up link
frontend_test_details.servers_list: PASSED - Servers list displays after login with 8 test servers visible
frontend_test_details.tab_navigation: PASSED - All tabs (Servers, Messages, Search, Profile) navigable
frontend_test_details.server_details: PASSED - Server details screen shows channels (text and voice sections)
frontend_test_details.channel_chat: PASSED - Channel chat loads, message input works, messages send and display
frontend_test_details.profile_screen: PASSED - Profile shows username, email, bio, online status, and logout button

websocket_notes: WebSocket connection established successfully during channel chat testing. Messages sent via REST API appear in real-time in the UI, indicating Socket.IO integration is working.
mobile_ui_notes: Mobile viewport (375x667) tested. UI is responsive and follows mobile-first design. Touch targets are adequate. Dark theme applied consistently. Text is readable with good contrast.
